---
title: ""
unnumbered: true

author:
  - name: "Ángela Yaneli Ortiz Diaz"
    email: angela.ortiz69@unach.mx
    affiliations:
      - ref: unach
    corresponding: true

  - name: "Asesor: Dr. Yofre Hernán García Gómez"
    role: "Director de tesis"
    email: yofre.garcia@unach.mx
    affiliations:
      - ref: unach

affiliations:
  - id: unach
    name: "Universidad Autónoma de Chiapas"
---

:::{style="text-align: justify"}
# Resumen



**Palabras clave**: 

## Abstract

**Keywords**: 

:::
